states.name: Off_Idle_NoLT
states.description: Device is off, Lighting feature not supported. No timing attributes are used.

states.name: On_Idle_NoLT
states.description: Device is on, Lighting feature not supported. No timing attributes are used.

states.name: Off_Idle_LT
states.description: Device is off, Lighting feature supported. Timers (OnTime, OffWaitTime) are not actively counting.

states.name: On_Idle_LT
states.description: Device is on, Lighting feature supported. Timers are either zero or disabled; no active countdown.

states.name: Timed_On_LT
states.description: Timed On state for Lighting feature. Device is on and OnTime is actively counting down.

states.name: Delayed_Off_LT
states.description: Delayed Off state for Lighting feature. Device is off and OffWaitTime is actively counting down.

transitions.description: Off command while already off without Lighting feature keeps device off.
Off command turns device off when it was on and no Lighting feature is present.
On command turns device on when OffOnly feature is not present.
On command keeps device on when it was already on and OffOnly feature is not present.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND but FSM state does not change.
transitions.description: On is rejected when OffOnly feature is enabled; device remains off.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND but FSM state does not change.
transitions.description: On is rejected when OffOnly feature is enabled, even if device is already on.
Toggle turns device on from off when OffOnly feature is not present.
Toggle turns device off from on when OffOnly feature is not present.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: Toggle is rejected when OffOnly feature is enabled; stays off.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: Toggle is rejected when OffOnly feature is enabled; stays on.
Off command in Lighting configuration keeps device off and clears OnTime.
Off command turns device off and clears OnTime when Lighting feature is present.

transitions.timing_requirements: Abstracts immediate cancel of timing behavior when Off is invoked.
transitions.description: Off cancels Timed On operation and turns device off, clearing OnTime.

transitions.timing_requirements: Abstracts immediate reset of timing behavior when Off is invoked.
transitions.description: Off keeps device off and clears timing when in Delayed Off.

transitions.timing_requirements: OffWaitTime is cleared because OnTime is 0 in Off_Idle_LT by invariant.
transitions.description: On turns device on from off, clears OffWaitTime under Lighting behavior.

transitions.timing_requirements: OffWaitTime cleared when OnTime == 0.
transitions.description: On keeps device on and clears OffWaitTime when already on and OnTime == 0.

transitions.timing_requirements: If OnTime > 0 the spec does not require clearing; we keep timer unchanged.
transitions.description: On while in Timed_On_LT keeps device on; timer behavior continues.

transitions.timing_requirements: OnTime assumed 0 or 0xFFFF in Delayed_Off_LT; when 0, OffWaitTime is cleared.
transitions.description: On turns device on from Delayed Off and clears OffWaitTime when no OnTime is running.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: On is rejected under OffOnly feature; no change.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: On is rejected even if device is already on when OffOnly is enabled.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: On is rejected in Timed_On_LT when OffOnly is enabled; state unchanged.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: On is rejected in Delayed_Off_LT when OffOnly is enabled; state unchanged.
Toggle turns device on from off in Lighting configuration.
Toggle turns device off from on and clears timers.

transitions.timing_requirements: Abstracts cancel of timed on when toggled off.
transitions.description: Toggle during Timed_On_LT turns device off and clears timers.

transitions.timing_requirements: Simplified: Toggle from delayed off goes to on with no remaining timers.
transitions.description: Toggle during Delayed_Off_LT turns device on and clears timers.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: Toggle is rejected under OffOnly feature while off.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: Toggle is rejected under OffOnly feature while on.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: Toggle is rejected under OffOnly feature while in Timed_On_LT.

transitions.timing_requirements: Server returns UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND.
transitions.description: Toggle is rejected under OffOnly feature while in Delayed_Off_LT.

transitions.timing_requirements: Represents call to store_global_scene() before turning off.
transitions.description: OffWithEffect stores global scene, clears GlobalSceneControl, turns device off, and clears OnTime.

transitions.timing_requirements: No additional scene storage because GlobalSceneControl is already FALSE.
transitions.description: OffWithEffect turns device off without storing a new global scene when GlobalSceneControl is FALSE.

transitions.timing_requirements: Scene behavior and GlobalSceneControl follow same rules as from On_Idle_LT; abstracted here.
transitions.description: OffWithEffect cancels Timed_On_LT and turns device off with effect.

transitions.timing_requirements: Command discarded when GlobalSceneControl is TRUE.
transitions.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene is ignored if no stored global scene is pending.

transitions.timing_requirements: ScenesManagementCluster.recall_global_scene() is abstracted as setting OnOff to TRUE and restoring attributes.
transitions.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene recalls global scene, turns device on, sets GlobalSceneControl to TRUE, and clears OffWaitTime if OnTime == 0.

transitions.timing_requirements: Command discarded because device is off and AcceptOnlyWhenOn bit is set.
transitions.description: OnWithTimedOff is ignored when AcceptOnlyWhenOn requires on-state but device is off.

transitions.timing_requirements: OffWaitTime becomes positive and starts countdown.
transitions.description: OnWithTimedOff while off sets OffWaitTime to the field value and enters Delayed_Off_LT.
OnWithTimedOff with zero OffWaitTime while off does not start a delayed off period.

transitions.timing_requirements: max() semantics simplified by assigning OnTimeField directly when > 0.
transitions.description: OnWithTimedOff starts Timed_On_LT when sent while on and OnTimeField is positive.

transitions.timing_requirements: No Timed_On_LT entered because OnTimeField is zero; OffWaitTime may be used for guarding off.
transitions.description: OnWithTimedOff with zero OnTimeField while on adjusts OffWaitTime but stays in On_Idle_LT.

transitions.timing_requirements: min() behavior simplified to overwrite with field; parser can constrain to min if needed.
transitions.description: OnWithTimedOff in Delayed_Off_LT refreshes OffWaitTime with a new value.

transitions.timing_requirements: max() semantics: if OnTimeField is not greater, keep OnTime unchanged.
transitions.description: OnWithTimedOff while in Timed_On_LT updates OffWaitTime but keeps the current timer if new OnTimeField is not greater.

transitions.timing_requirements: Extends the remaining OnTime when a larger value is provided.
transitions.description: OnWithTimedOff while in Timed_On_LT extends the OnTime timer and updates OffWaitTime.

transitions.timing_requirements: Represents periodic 0.1 s decrement while OnTime is greater than 1.
transitions.description: Timer tick decrements OnTime during Timed_On_LT without leaving the state.

transitions.timing_requirements: Models the transition when OnTime reaches 0: device turns off and OffWaitTime is set to 0.
transitions.description: Final timer tick in Timed_On_LT expires OnTime and turns device off.

transitions.timing_requirements: Represents periodic 0.1 s decrement while OffWaitTime is greater than 1.
transitions.description: Timer tick decrements OffWaitTime during Delayed_Off_LT without leaving the state.

transitions.timing_requirements: Models end of delayed off period when OffWaitTime reaches 0.
transitions.description: Final timer tick in Delayed_Off_LT clears OffWaitTime and returns to Off_Idle_LT.

scene_behaviors: Global scene is stored when OffWithEffect is processed and GlobalSceneControl == TRUE; GlobalSceneControl is then set to FALSE.
Global scene is recalled by OnWithRecallGlobalScene when GlobalSceneControl == FALSE; after recall, GlobalSceneControl is set to TRUE.
Scenes Management cluster recall_global_scene() is abstracted as setting OnOff and related attributes according to stored scene.

definitions.definition: TYPE: bool. VALUES: FALSE (off), TRUE (on). DEFAULT: FALSE. Indicates whether the device is off or on. Modified by Off, On, Toggle, OffWithEffect, OnWithRecallGlobalScene and OnWithTimedOff timer behavior.
definitions.usage_context: Key attribute determining main power state and DeadFront behavior for other clusters.

definitions.definition: TYPE: bool. VALUES: FALSE, TRUE. DEFAULT: TRUE. Present when feature_LT == TRUE. Controls storing and recall of global scene: set to FALSE by OffWithEffect when a global scene is stored; set to TRUE by OnWithRecallGlobalScene and by certain Level/Scenes operations.
definitions.usage_context: Used in guards for OffWithEffect and OnWithRecallGlobalScene transitions.

definitions.definition: TYPE: uint16. RANGE: 0..0xFFFF. DEFAULT: 0. Present when feature_LT == TRUE. Represents time in 1/10 s to keep device on in Timed On state. VALUE 0xFFFF disables automatic decrement. VALUE 0 means timer not active or expired.
definitions.usage_context: Used for Timed_On_LT invariants and OnWithTimedOff timer behavior.

definitions.definition: TYPE: uint16. RANGE: 0..0xFFFF. DEFAULT: 0. Present when feature_LT == TRUE. Represents guarding time in 1/10 s in Delayed Off state. VALUE 0xFFFF disables automatic decrement.
definitions.usage_context: Used for Delayed_Off_LT invariants and OnWithTimedOff behavior when device is off.

definitions.definition: TYPE: StartUpOnOffEnum or null. DEFAULT: manufacturer specific (MS). Controls startup behavior of OnOff attribute: Off, On, or Toggle based on prior state when not null; null means restore previous OnOff state. OTA reboot restores prior OnOff regardless.
definitions.usage_context: Not explicitly modeled in states; can be applied as initial assignment to OnOff at power-up events.

definitions.definition: TYPE: bitmap (map32). Relevant bits: LT (bit 0), DF (bit 1), OFFONLY (bit 2). Conformance rules: LT and DF are not allowed with OFFONLY, and OFFONLY is not allowed with LT or DF.
definitions.usage_context: Used to derive feature_LT, feature_DF, and feature_OFFONLY boolean flags in guards and invariants.

definitions.definition: Derived boolean: TRUE if FeatureMap has Lighting bit set (LT == 1), else FALSE.
definitions.usage_context: Partitions state space between *_NoLT and *_LT states; enables OnTime/OffWaitTime and scene-related attributes.

definitions.definition: Derived boolean: TRUE if FeatureMap has DeadFrontBehavior bit set (DF == 1), else FALSE. Implies certain other clusters may reject operations when OnOff == FALSE.
definitions.usage_context: Not explicitly modeled as extra states here; can be added as guards in cross-cluster behaviors.

definitions.definition: Derived boolean: TRUE if FeatureMap has OffOnly bit set (OFFONLY == 1), else FALSE. When TRUE, On and Toggle commands must result in UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND with no state change.
definitions.usage_context: Used in guards of transitions for On and Toggle to model rejection in OffOnly configuration.

definitions.definition: TYPE: map8. BIT 0: AcceptOnlyWhenOn. When this bit is 1, OnWithTimedOff commands are only accepted if OnOff == TRUE; otherwise they are discarded.
definitions.usage_context: Used as OnOffControl_AcceptOnlyWhenOn flag in OnWithTimedOff transitions.

definitions.definition: TYPE: enum8. VALUES: 0x00 Off, 0x01 On, 0x02 Toggle. Defines how OnOff is set at startup when StartUpOnOff is not null.
definitions.usage_context: Determines initial assignment of OnOff upon power-up; not part of runtime command transitions.

definitions.definition: TYPE: enum8. VALUES: 0x00 DelayedAllOff, 0x01 DyingLight. Selects visual effect variant in OffWithEffect; value must be non-reserved.
definitions.usage_context: Command parameter for OffWithEffect; FSM abstracts visual effect and focuses on OnOff and GlobalSceneControl changes.

definitions.definition: TYPE: enum8. VALUES: 0x00 DelayedOffFastFade, 0x01 NoFade, 0x02 DelayedOffSlowFade. Variants for DelayedAllOff effect.
definitions.usage_context: Validates EffectVariant field when EffectIdentifier == DelayedAllOff; not modeled in state logic.

definitions.definition: TYPE: enum8. VALUES: 0x00 DyingLightFadeOff. Variant for DyingLight effect.
definitions.usage_context: Validates EffectVariant field when EffectIdentifier == DyingLight; not modeled in state logic.

definitions.definition: Abstract state representing operation of OnWithTimedOff while device is on. Invariants: OnOff == TRUE, OnTime > 0, OnTime != 0xFFFF. Timer decrements OnTime every 0.1 s until it reaches 0.
definitions.usage_context: Used to model transitions driven by OnWithTimedOff and periodic timer ticks.

definitions.definition: Abstract state representing off period guarded by OffWaitTime after OnWithTimedOff or related behavior. Invariants: OnOff == FALSE, OffWaitTime > 0, OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF.
definitions.usage_context: Used to model guarded off behavior and periodic countdown of OffWaitTime.

definitions.definition: Abstract event representing a 0.1 second tick that decrements OnTime or OffWaitTime as specified in the cluster behavior. It is not a Matter command, but an internal periodic action.
definitions.usage_context: Used as trigger for self-transitions and exit transitions in Timed_On_LT and Delayed_Off_LT.

references.name: FeatureMap
references.description: Bitmap defining LT, DF, and OFFONLY features which control conditional behavior of the On/Off cluster.

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Global attribute stating cluster version; not explicitly modeled in FSM, but constrains implementation revision.

references.name: Level Control Cluster
references.description: Cluster whose commands may change OnOff, OnTime, and OffWaitTime values; interactions are abstracted in this FSM.

references.name: Scenes Management server cluster
references.description: Provides global scene storage and recall; invoked indirectly by OffWithEffect and OnWithRecallGlobalScene.

references.name: UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND status
references.description: Interaction Model error returned when On or Toggle commands are invoked on servers with OffOnly feature enabled.

references.name: INVALID_IN_STATE status code
references.description: Used by other clusters when DeadFrontBehavior is active and OnOff == FALSE; not explicitly modeled in this FSM.
